products.title: realme GT7 Pro 5G (Mars Orange, 16GB RAM, 512GB Storage)
products.short_description: realme GT7 Pro 5G with Snapdragon 8 Elite chipset, 124MP AI camera, 5800mAh battery, and 120W ultra-fast charging for flagship-level performance.
products.long_description: The realme GT7 Pro 5G is a premium flagship smartphone designed for power users and gamers. It features a large 6.78-inch quad-curved 120Hz display that delivers smooth visuals and immersive viewing. Powered by the latest Snapdragon 8 Elite chipset, it ensures ultra-fast performance and efficient multitasking. The device packs a 5800mAh battery supported by 120W ultra-fast charging, allowing quick power-ups. Its 124MP AI camera captures detailed images in various lighting conditions, while IP69 rating ensures durability against water and dust. With 16GB RAM and 512GB storage, it offers ample space and lag-free performance.
cons: Battery drains faster during heavy gaming
Camera performance weaker in low light
UI may feel complex for some users

positive: Very fast performance and smooth multitasking
negative: Battery could be better for heavy users

offers: Up to ₹2,067 cashback on select cards
